title: Breakwave Weekend Read
summary:
Main
As the week comes to a close, take a moment to review the key insights from the past few days. We've gathered all the top insights for you to catch up at your convenience. Seasonal Headwinds as We Enter October - Despite relatively robust spot rates across all dry bulk segments, a note of caution for the near term is warranted.
